start.text: The Holy One shall once again march to the glorious battlefield.
Fight for the deity you believe in.
May my radiance illuminate the path ahead once more.
Advance... under the guidance of the Saint.
Sinners shall perish under the sword of judgment.
May the gods forgive your sins.
(Don't worry... I'll make sure you die just right... hehehe...)

start_boss.text: Warriors... it is time to sacrifice yourselves for the light!
The light of the Divine Cross shall purge all darkness from this world.
Such wickedness... must be utterly destroyed!
(Hehehe... this makes sending people to their deaths so much easier...)

retreat.text: Fall back for now... we shall regroup swiftly.
As long as we draw breath... we can still hold back the darkness!
For the wishes of the fallen, please survive...
(Don't worry... there are still many ways to send people to their deaths...)

out_of_missiles.text: Though the sparks have faded, the light remains...
(Now the conditions for reckless deaths are ripe...)

engaged.text: Face the judgment of the Saint...!
All evil in this world shall be brought to justice!
Heaven's gates may not open for you, but there's always a place for you in hell!
Face the judgment of the righteous army...!

need_help.text: Because the darkness is strong... the light must come together!
Lost lambs... behold this divine radiance!
(Haha... now those unlucky ones will die halfway trying to save me)

pursuing.text: There is no escape from judgment...!
The sword hanging above has already fallen!
Turn around and face the sins of your past!
There is always room for repentance!
(Can we cause more losses by being reckless?)

running.text: I still need to illuminate more places...!
(Where would it be more interesting to let them perish...?)

hull_90.text: The holy flames of heaven burn brightly...
(Soon I can retreat under the guise of mode switching...)

hull_50.text: Come... witness this flash of genesis!
Can you feel it? The light is gathering!
Darkness... tremble before this righteous fury!
(Now I just need to recover slowly, and those fools will regain their courage to die for me~)

hull_30.text: Do you see? The Saint still stands!
As long as I live... the light will not fade!
Evil beings... the Holy One will never yield to you!
(That's right... go die to protect the fragile Saint, it's not like I'm on the ship anyway...)

overload.text: (Hoho... now you have no choice but to protect me, right?)

death.text: Looks like the role-playing game is over once again~
What a pity, we haven't been wiped out yet...
Please stand up... oh, it's already over, Iris~
Next time something like this happens, remember to call me, Iris~

victory.text: The side of justice... is invincible!
Do you see... this is the fate of the wicked!
(Boring... I want to see a river of blood, on our side.)
